children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established the Interdepartmental Task Force on Vocational Education and Related Programs (in this section referred to as the “Task Force”).

children.heading: Membership
children.label: b Membership
children.text: The Task Force shall consist of the Secretary of Education, the Secretary of Labor, the Secretary of Health and Human Services, and such other personnel of the Department of Education, the Department of Labor, and the Department of Health and Human Services as the Secretaries consider appropriate.

examine principal data required for programs under the Adult Education Act, the Carl D. Perkins Vocational and Applied Technology Education Act, the Job Training Partnership Act, the Rehabilitation Act of 1973 [ et seq.], and the Wagner-Peyser Act [ et seq.];29 U.S.C. 70129 U.S.C. 49
examine possible common objectives, definitions, measures, and standards for such programs; and
consider integration of research and development conducted with Federal assistance in the area of vocational education and related areas, including areas of emerging technologies.
